case_title: SCOTT, GARY et al vs. KNIGHT, JR., CHARLES H. et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: UTRECHT, PAUL FERDINAND SUBSTITUTED FOR ROSENTHAL, STEVEN S AS ATTORNEY FOR SCOTT, GARY MINEAR, DAVID W. HILL, JOHN E. FORNACHON, JOHN E.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCOTT, GARY MINEAR, DAVID W. HILL, JOHN E. FORNACHON, JOHN E. SERVED SEP-26-1997, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT KNIGHT, JR., CHARLES H.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCOTT, GARY MINEAR, DAVID W. HILL, JOHN E. FORNACHON, JOHN E.
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT KNIGHT, JR., CHARLES H.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCOTT, GARY MINEAR, DAVID W. HILL, JOHN E. FORNACHON, JOHN E. AS TO DEFENDANT KNIGHT, JR., CHARLES H. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT KNIGHT, JR., CHARLES H.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCOTT, GARY MINEAR, DAVID W. HILL, JOHN E. FORNACHON, JOHN E. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KNIGHT, JR., CHARLES H. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 747 LEAVENWORTH ST #5
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $66.67 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCOTT, GARY MINEAR, DAVID W. HILL, JOHN E. FORNACHON, JOHN E.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT KNIGHT, JR., CHARLES H.
